what: Validate git URL format and accessibility
why: Reject malformed URLs before attempting network operations
output: Validated URL object with parsed protocol, host, and repository path

success_handling.criteria: URL matches supported git URL patterns (HTTPS or SSH) and parses without error

event.message: Git URL is valid and uses supported protocol

error_handling.criteria: URL does not match any known git URL pattern (no protocol, malformed host, missing repo path)
error_handling.action: Return validation error with format hint, prompt user to correct URL

error_handling.criteria: URL uses a protocol other than HTTPS or SSH (e.g., git://, ftp://)
error_handling.action: Return error indicating only HTTPS and SSH are supported

decisions.condition: URL is valid and uses supported protocol
URL is invalid or uses unsupported protocol
decisions.outcome: Abort registration, return error to user
